stemHtml: During a low level flight at 1000 ft over the sea, an aircraft approaches an intense area of low pressure. A QNH of 1012 hPa is set on the subscale. Which of the following statements correctly describes the situation regarding the aircraft's altitude?

options.a: The indicated altitude from the aneroid altimeter will be decreasing.
options.b: The radio altimeter will show an increase in altitude.
options.c: The aircraft's true altitude will be decreasing.
options.d: The pressure altitude will be increasing.
